title: phlox stansburyi var. hirsuta
intro: Phlox stansburyi var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy Stansbury phlox, is a variety of perennial plant belonging to the phlox family and native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The hairy Stansbury phlox has been valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phlox stansburyi var. hirsuta include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
